mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id, score, content, evaluator_id, evaluate_time, create_time, update_time FROM repair_order_evaluation WHERE order_id = #{orderId} LIMIT 1

SELECT e.id, e.order_id, e.score, e.content, e.evaluator_id, u.real_name AS evaluator_real_name, e.evaluate_time FROM repair_order_evaluation e LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON e.evaluator_id = u.id AND u.is_deleted = 0 WHERE e.order_id = #{orderId} LIMIT 1
